caption: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair and glasses is centered against a plain dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, patterned tunic with a v-neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the lower-left corner of each scene, a small gold circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks, with her facial expressions shifting from a neutral, open-mouthed position to a slight smile, and then back to a focused expression with her mouth open as she continues talking. Her posture remains still, facing the camera directly, while only her facial movements change to reflect her speech.
